title: selaginella arrecta
intro: Selaginella arrecta, also known as the 'Stinging Spikemoss', is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella arrecta include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
